highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 3.119.2 adds Windows Spectre mitigations, security hardening flags, and missing tvOS API overloads.

bullets.detail: Several SKSurface.Create overloads that were available on other Apple platforms were missing on tvOS; they are now included.

bullets.lead: Android debug symbols preserved and packaged
bullets.detail: Android native debug symbols are now preserved and included in the symbol packages, improving crash diagnostics.

bullets.lead: Spectre mitigations enabled for Windows native binaries
bullets.detail: Spectre v1 mitigation flags (/Qspectre) are now enabled for both libSkiaSharp.dll and libSkiaSharp.so on Windows.

bullets.lead: Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck enabled
bullets.detail: All Windows native DLLs now build with Control Flow Guard (/guard:cf) and BufferSecurityCheck (/GS) flags, satisfying BinSkim BA2007 and improving exploit resistance.

contributor_summaries.Aguilex: Enabled Spectre mitigations and security hardening flags for Windows native binaries

preview_summaries.v3.119.2-preview.3.1: Preview 3 added the Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll on Windows.
preview_summaries.v3.119.2-preview.2.3: Preview 2 enabled Control Flow Guard and BufferSecurityCheck on Windows native DLLs to satisfy BinSkim security requirements.
preview_summaries.v3.119.2-preview.1.2: Preview 1 introduced the missing tvOS SKSurface.Create overloads and Android symbol packaging.

harfbuzz_summary: Ships HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.1.3 with the Windows security hardening and tvOS packaging improvements from this release.
